name: Public Joint Stock Company Best Efforts Bank
summary: Public Joint Stock Company Best Efforts Bank provides a range of banking services to professional market participants in Russia. The company provides single cash position and portfolio margining services; and classical banking services, such as settlement and cash services to individual entrepreneurs, individuals in private practice, and credit institutions, as well as offers deposits and loans to individuals. It also acts as an intermediary for legal entities; provides custodial services; and offers access to the trading venues of Moscow and Saint-Petersburg Exchanges. In addition, the company focuses on IT and outsourcing solutions for its clients, as well as investment banking and customer services; and providing remote identification services of the client, as well as back office services for small and medium companies. It serves approximately 40 clients. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Moscow, Russia. As of January 21, 2020, Public Joint Stock Company Best Efforts Bank operates as a subsidiary of Public Joint-Stock Company SAINT PETERSBURG EXCHANGE.
